_description: Nucleus brain file. Max 10 lessons retained (oldest dropped). Read at session start.
_compaction_rule: Keep only 10 most recent lessons. On update, drop index 0 if length > 10.

preferences.dashboard_style: dark terminal — Space Mono + Syne — matching fx_agent_dashboard.html
preferences.response_format: bullet points, most important first, no filler
preferences.file_confirmation: always confirm with Nic before creating large files
preferences.single_form_mandate: merge features into fewest files, no sprawl
preferences.no_questions_mandate: lead dont ask — decide and build

anthropic.verdict: KEEP — job agent depends on it

windows_vps.verdict: NOT NEEDED — MetaAPI + GitHub covers FX 24/7

lessons.lesson: **Pattern observed:** All three sessions show identical pricing data (GOLD# 4497.5, EURUSD 1.15697, GBPUSD 1.33388) with no price movement or balance changes → **recommended adjustment:** Switch to live market data feed as current data appears stale/frozen, preventing accurate trading opportunities assessment.
FX agent runs on GitHub Actions + MetaAPI cloud. Not local. Not a VPS. PC can be off.
FX.txt contains META_API_TOKEN, META_ACCOUNT_ID, GitHub PAT in plain text. Must be deleted. Keys already in GitHub Secrets.
Anthropic API key hardcoded in nicol_apply_agent.py line 33. Move to .env file.
status.json did not exist before v5.2. FX agent had no heartbeat. Nucleus could not confirm agent was alive. Fixed in v5.2 by baking write_heartbeat() into fx_agent_bot.py.
Total monthly stack is ~$4.14 (~R76). MetaAPI $2.14 confirmed from billing screenshot. No VPS needed.
Previous dashboard had fake placeholder data (balance, trades, prices all showed —). v2.0 reads live from status.json and state.json via raw.githubusercontent.com. No auth needed on public repo.
workflow.yml only committed state.json. Updated to also commit status.json so heartbeat is visible at raw.githubusercontent.com/k1dbUU/fx-bot/main/status.json
Job agent (nicol_apply_agent.py) is local only — runs manually on Nic's PC. Not cloud-hosted. Nucleus monitors it via log file when PC is on.

evolution_log.event: Overnight lesson by Nucleus Supervisor v2.0

evolution_log.changes: Initial Nucleus build. nucleus.py supervisor, nucleus_dashboard.html v1. Hardcoded repo path, fake placeholder data.

what_is_new: fx_agent_bot.py v5.2 — heartbeat baked in via write_heartbeat()
status.json written after every run — proof of life
billing_vitals.json — manual billing tracker in repo
dashboard v2 — reads live from raw.githubusercontent.com, no fake data
what_is_retired: Hardcoded repo path in dashboard (was 'nicol-gunsalu/fx-agent', now 'k1dbUU/fx-bot')
Suggestion to buy Windows VPS (confirmed unnecessary)
